caption: API Activity
description: API events describe general CRUD (Create, Read, Update, Delete) API activities, e.g. (AWS Cloudtrail)
name: api_activity

1.caption: Create
1.description: The API call in the event pertains to a 'create' activity.

2.caption: Read
2.description: The API call in the event pertains to a 'read' activity.

3.caption: Update
3.description: The API call in the event pertains to a 'update' activity.

4.caption: Delete
4.description: The API call in the event pertains to a 'delete' activity.

5.caption: Invoke
5.description: The API call triggers execution of a process, job, tool, or workflow rather than performing a CRUD operation on a resource. Covers agent tool calls, pipeline triggers, and imperative commands.

6.caption: Share
6.description: The API call expands access or exposure of a resource to another entity — adding members, setting permissions, creating shared links, or sending data to an external recipient. Distinct from Create to preserve the security-relevant signal of access expansion.

http_request.description: Details about the underlying http request.

http_response.description: Details about the underlying http response.

resources.description: Details about resources that were affected by the activity/event.

src_endpoint.description: Details about the source of the activity.
